0111100111111010001110000000110010010101011011000 - ASI: 23

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  001 = 00 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  1010 = 10 * 10
  00111 = 001 * 11
  01010 = 0 * 1010
  01111 = 011 * 11
  000011 = 000 * 011
  001001 = 001 * 001
  011000 = 011 * 000
  0011111 = 00111 * 11
  0101011 = 01010 * 11
  00111000 = 00111 * 000
  000011001001 = 000011 * 001001
  011110011111 = 01111 * 0011111
  101000111000 = 1010 * 00111000
  0101011011000 = 0101011 * 011000
  011110011111101000111000 = 011110011111 * 101000111000
  0000110010010101011011000 = 000011001001 * 0101011011000
  0111100111111010001110000000110010010101011011000 = 011110011111101000111000 * 0000110010010101011011000
